wpflow.what: WordPress operator MCP server — wraps WordPress REST API via Application Passwords for Claude Desktop / Claude Code agents
wpflow.target_buyer: non-coder WP site owners + small agencies managing 5-25 sites
data_sources: live WordPress REST API via /wp-json/wp/v2/* endpoints, Basic auth with Application Password

monetization.week1_target: first paying Solo sub by Day 3; 10 paying customers by 2026-04-27
monetization.kill_signal: <10 paid + <150 activated free users by 2026-05-20 → pivot to DECISION.md #2 (Meta Ads) or #5 (OpenAPI→MCP generator)

patterns.mcp_build_recipe: Recon (market/demand/money parallel agents) -> Synthesis (cross-reference overlap) -> Architect + Data-Ingestor parallel -> Builder sequential -> Install + smoke -> GTM
patterns.mcp_auth_gotchas: WordPress Application Passwords skip OAuth review gates; TasteWP is fronted by Cloudflare so any Python client must send a browser UA header (urllib default is blocked with 403 error 1010); httpx default UA works
patterns.mcp_pricing_anchor: 21st.dev Magic at $20/mo hit $10K MRR in 6 weeks — prosumer $9-29/mo is the proven standalone-SaaS MCP band
